<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in this template so review is fast.
For small typo fixes, the first three sections are enough.
-->

## Linked issue
<!-- e.g. Closes #42. If no issue exists and this is a small fix, write "n/a" and describe the problem below. -->


## What this changes
<!-- One or two sentences. What did you change, and in which chapter / section? -->


## Why
<!-- The motivation. For a typo: skip. For anything larger: what was wrong / unclear / missing? -->


## Before and after
<!--
A screenshot of the rendered PDF before and after your change makes review trivial.
Drag-and-drop the images directly into this textbox. For pure source changes (e.g. a comment), say "source only, no rendered change".
-->

**Before:**

**After:**


## Checklist

- [ ] I edited the source `.tex` file under `lecturenotes/<series>/chapters/`, not a generated `_ch_*.tex` or `draft.tex` wrapper.
- [ ] I built the affected file locally with `latexmk -pdf` and it compiled without new errors.
- [ ] My diff is focused on one fix or one related set of fixes. No unrelated reformatting.
- [ ] I did not commit build artifacts (`.aux`, `.log`, `.pdf` wrappers, etc.).
- [ ] If this is a larger content change, I opened an issue first and got a go-ahead.
